name: Adventus Regis Aurati (Arrival of the King in Yellow)

description.value:
The newer Latin version of the tale of a decadent royal family and the arrival of the god-king in tattered yellow robes. Written as a play script meant to be performed by a troupe of actors. Contains a strange yellow three-armed symbol representing the King in Yellow that requires a Sanity Check for 1/1D6 when viewed. Performances of this work are rumored to cause madness.

LanguageLatin
AuthorLivius Carbo
Date88 A.D.
Sanity Loss1D6
Cthulhu Mythos+1/+4 percentiles
Mythos Rating15
Study (weeks)1

Spells Contained

  • Call/Dismiss Hastur
  • Song of Hastur
  • The Yellow Sign
